headline: Regime flips risk-on: CMCSA spin-off + RKLB/IRDM deal ignite space & media; 3 desk takes live.

market_state.line: SPY +1.26%, QQQ +2.06%, VXX stress 0.94 — tape ripping, above 50d, entries chasing but vol is supportive.

actions.line: Tax-free NBCU spin catalyst; half size — late-entry crowding risk after +11% 5d.
Clean technicals, low-severity risk flags, Research neutral but signal + setup align — full size.
Refiner momentum play; quarter size only — exhaustion flags after +18% 5d, weak Research.

watch.line: High-confidence CMCSA read-through: spin validates SOTP structure, re-rates WBD's discount.
+22.4% on RKLB acquisition announcement — unusual volume (3.56x) confirms conviction.
Direct IRDM comp; acquisition multiple sets valuation floor, revives MSS satellite M&A spec.
+4.6% — Alphabet added to the Dow; index-rebalance buying flow not fully absorbed.

changed: Regime flipped from mixed to risk_on (SPY +1.26%, QQQ +2.06%)
Three desk takes live vs. zero last scan

caveats: RTH scan as of 12:39 ET 2026-06-29 — prices are point-in-time; fast-moving names (IRDM +22%, CMCSA) may have gapped further from desk entry levels.
